pr.title: [Non-record] XSA + EMA + TTT: Negative interaction study (val_bpb=1.1436)

output.summary: TTT's SGD adaptation on the XSA+EMA base confirms their local-context redundancy and EMA disruption, so stacking them worsens eval behavior.
output.valOnlyReasoning: TTT runs SGD on validation shards during evaluation, so the adaptation phase trains solely on validation data.
techniques: Exclusive self-attention on final layers with EMA-smoothed weights
Test-time training via multi-epoch full-model SGD with frozen early blocks
Dequantize int6 weights before sliding-window evaluation
